title: Rarity Item Borders
description: Highlight your rare items with colored slot borders
body:
# **Rarity Item Borders**
![rarityItemBorders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0da81ac9e635647edb0337300ad2e68585acdce5.png)


This resource pack adds a border to inventory slots for items with a higher rarity than common and enchanted items.

Disclaimer:\
This resource pack is entirely inspired by [Item Borders](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-borders)

Compatibility:\
Vanilla only

**Warning:\
Place the resource pack at the top!!\
This resource is not compatible with other resources that edit the Items model definition.\
For some reason, this requires optifine or its alternative.**
